epigraph.quote: We took a funicular up to the town, bought delicious patisserie + walked to the wrong church!

per_stop.quote: Barry Guy got everyone to improvise, set off by his double bass. Very hot.
At the end of the trip we heard "Will the parents of Charles Kirby please come to the Information desk on C Deck?"
5 girls were playing ping pong with Peter. Thomas + William went to help + there was all-out chaos with the girls running off with the bats + ball.
We took a funicular up to the town, bought delicious patisserie + walked to the wrong church!
It's a green, quiet campsite with a barn with ping pong + football. In the afternoon we went down to the river to paddle.
The cathedral is lovely, calm, uncluttered. Stained glass windows.
Charles is very brave with the cold water. Everyone took it in turns to ice down in the freezing water. White chalk billows up.
A dog came up while I sketched this in a driveway near Autun + ate half a very dead dead rabbit.
We drove on to St. Jean de Vaux, & camped in the middle of the Burgundy Vineyards.
William bumped his head for the first time because of his height on the tunnel ceiling.
We drove north + looked at a wood + plaster church at Ste. Marie-du-lac, a nice church with a minstrel's gallery.
